name_cn:
SAC PLAT BB Handbag #️⃣M45847
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to Chanel boutique specifications, featuring dynamic chip technology and code changes. Original factory materials, original factory champagne gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure a 100% authentic feel! Exclusive original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website latest gift box!
21.5 x 22 x 9 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Zipper pocket
Patch pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable

Adjustable to: 55.0 cm
Handles: Double handles
Made in France
